abort.missing_configuration: The application credentials are not configured
abort.api_error: Failed to connect to the Gecko API after authentication. Please try again.

abort.reconfigure_successful: Options saved; integration reloaded so alert entities match the new setting.
abort.energy_linked: Energy data linked successfully. The integration has been reloaded.
abort.energy_unlinked: Energy data unlinked. The integration has been reloaded.
abort.energy_not_linked: No energy data link to remove.

settings.title: Cloud REST & alerts
settings.description: Optional Gecko Cloud REST polling: vessel summary tiles (numbers/strings merged as cloud.rest.* when MQTT is sparse or disconnected) and a separate alerts poll (unread messages scope + vessel actions). Uses only IDs from this config entry.

data.cloud_rest_only_when_mqtt_down: Only poll REST when MQTT is disconnected

data_description.cloud_rest_poll_interval: How often to fetch tile and chemistry enrichment (pH, ORP, water temp, alkalinity, chlorine, etc.) from the Gecko cloud REST API. Default: 86400 seconds (once per day). Live state still updates from MQTT every coordinator cycle. Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.cloud_rest_only_when_mqtt_down: When enabled, REST polling only runs while MQTT is disconnected. Default: off — keeps REST polling active so chemistry readings always update.
data_description.alerts_poll_interval: How often to fetch unread messages and vessel action alerts. Default: 0 (disabled). Recommended: 300 seconds (5 minutes) if you want alert notifications.
data_description.energy_poll_interval: How often to refresh premium energy metrics (consumption, score, cost) when energy data is linked. Default: 86400 seconds (once per day). Set to 0 to disable polling.

link_energy.title: Link energy data
link_energy.description:
This links a second Gecko login that unlocks energy consumption, charts, activities, routines, and other premium data.

1. Open the link below in your browser:

{authorize_url}

2. Log in with your Gecko account.
3. After login the browser will try to open an app link that starts with `com.geckoportal.gecko://` — it will fail to load (that is expected).
4. **Copy the full URL** from your browser's address bar and paste it below.

data_description.callback_url: Paste the full URL that starts with com.geckoportal.gecko://… here.

unlink_energy.title: Unlink energy data
unlink_energy.description: This will remove the linked energy data token. Energy, chart, activity, and routine sensors will no longer be available. Enable the checkbox and press Submit to confirm.

data.confirm_unlink: I want to unlink energy data

error.invalid_callback_url: Could not find an authorization code in the URL. Make sure you copied the full callback URL.
error.token_exchange_failed: Token exchange failed. The authorization code may have expired — please try again.
error.must_confirm_unlink: Please enable the confirmation checkbox to unlink energy data.

unsupported_hvac_mode.message: Unsupported HVAC mode: {hvac_mode}. Only HEAT mode is supported.
